FarmFlow
Home Features Crops & Animals inventory finance

Powerful features.
Built for real farms.

One dashboard. Everything you need to manage finances, crops, livestock, inventory, tasks and more — without complexity.

Open Dashboard →

Core Capabilities

Designed for farmers who want results — not another complicated app.

Farm Finance

Track every rupee — income, expenses, categories, net profit. Instant charts. Know your true margins.

Crop Planning

Record fields, planting dates, varieties, expected harvest. Track progress stages and plan rotations.

Livestock Records

Tag animals, track counts, births, health events, milk/meat production and breeding history.

Inputs & Inventory

Monitor fertilizer, seeds, fuel, pesticides. Low-stock alerts. Price trend graphs to time bulk buys.

Pest & Problem Log

Record outbreaks, treatments applied, effectiveness. Build knowledge that saves future crops and animals.

Works Offline

Full functionality on phone/tablet — even in the field with no signal. Data stays safe on your device.

Ready to run your farm smarter?

Start in seconds — no account, no credit card, no complexity.

Open SmartFarm Now →

SmartFarm • Made for farmers who want results, not admin work.

© 2026 SmartFarm • Open-source project for smarter, more profitable farming
